## What

Brief description of changes.

## Why

Motivation and context.

## Checklist

- [ ] `claude plugin validate .` passes
- [ ] Version bumped in plugin.json + marketplace.json if adding features
- [ ] README updated if user-facing changes
- [ ] All 30 STYLE_PRESETS remain unique (no duplicate colors)
- [ ] No banned fonts (Inter, Roboto, Arial) in new templates
- [ ] Tests pass: `python3 -m pytest tests/ -v`
